pages.text:
REÇU 21 SEP. 2009

Papa Now Guines

MINISTRY OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS, TRADE & IMMIGRATION

Government of the Independent State of Papua New Guinca

Office of the Minister

16 July 2009

HE Mr Bernard Kouchner . Minister for Foreign Affairs

Republic of France

Direction Generales des Affaires Politiques et de Securite

Direction des Nations Unies et des Organizations Internationales 37, quai d'Orsay 75351 Paris, France

Dear Colleague Minister Kouchner,

REQUEST FOR WORLD ORGANIZATION FOR ANIMAL

HEALTH (OTE) MEMBERSHIP FOR PAPUA NEW GUINEA

I have the honor to advise you that Papua New Guinea has decided to become a member of the World Organization for Animal Health (OFE).

The Goverment of Papua New Guinea has examined the provisios of the

International Agreement and of the Organic Statutes of 25 January 1924 and agrees to participate in the working costs of the Office under the conditions stated, especially with regard to Article 3 of the International Agreement and

Article 11 of the Internal Statutes.

The sixth (6) contribution category has been selected by my Government.

The official Delegate of Papua New Guinea to the OIE will be Dr. Nime

Kapo who is Chief Veterinary Officer.

P.O. BOX 422, WAIGANI, NCD, PAPUA NEW GUINEA, TELEPHONE: (675) 301 4206, FACSIMILE: (675) 301 4103

Email: forcignmin@darec.net.pg

: 2:

Yours faithfuliy,

Samuel T. Abal, MP

Minister for Foreign Affairs, Trade and Immigration

Ce: The Director General

OIE

12, rue de Prony 75017 Paris

France
